title: Death=Mob
description: When you die, you change into a different mob.
body: Ever wanted to be different? Are you tired of being just a boring old player? Then with this experience, that will change! With every death, a mob will be randomized for you and with the ability of that mob. Like if you morph into a llama, you are able to spit. The cooldown of the abilities of the mobs are customizable with the key, B. You will transform into that mob, with their health, attack damage, and ability (if they have one). This is able to be played with friends! Just make sure the server and everyones client has the file. (Email me at diegoibarra0902@gmail.com for any questions or bug reports, if distributing this mod, please credit me.)
